# CC - Amend the back link navigation on /how-does-the-export-leave-the-UK page

Description

## Background

Currently when the user presses back on the /how-does-the-export-leave-the-UK page they are navigated to /what-export-journey. However if user has navigated to this page by pressing 'Yes' on the /do-you-have-additional-transport-types page then they should be navigated back to /do-you-have-additional-transport-types

## User Story

As an exporter
I want to be directed to the /do-you-have-additional-transport-types page when I press 'Back' on /how-does-the-export-leave-the-UK if I have just selected 'Yes' to 'Do you have more transport modes to add?'
So that I am directed back to my transport summary

## Acceptance Criteria

Scenario 1 - Selecting back when adding additional transport mode
Given I have navigated to the /how-does-the-export-leave-the-UK page of my CC manual landing user journey
When I have navigated to this page by pressing 'Yes' and 'Save and continue' on /do-you-have-additional-transport-types

And I press 'Back'
Then I will be directed to /do-you-have-additional-transport-types page

Scenario 2 - Selecting back when on first transport mode

Given I have navigated to the /how-does-the-export-leave-the-UK page of my CC manual landing user journey

When I **have not** navigated to the page from /do-you-have-additional-transport-types page

And I press 'Back'

Then I will be directed to /what-export-journey

Scenario 3 - Selecting back when adding additional transport mode for a cloned document
Given I have navigated to the /how-does-the-export-leave-the-UK page of my CC manual landing user journey
When I have navigated to this page by pressing 'Yes' and 'Save and continue' on /do-you-have-additional-transport-types

And it is a cloned document

And I press 'Back'
Then I will be directed to /do-you-have-additional-transport-types page

Scenario 4 - Selecting back when on first transport mode for a cloned document

Given I have navigated to the /how-does-the-export-leave-the-UK page of my CC manual landing user journey

When I **have not** navigated to the page from /do-you-have-additional-transport-types page

And it is a cloned document

And I press 'Back'

Then I will be directed to /what-export-journey
